member.name: T:LJCDocDataDAL.LJCDocDataClass
member.summary: Represents a DocData class.

member.summary: Initializes an object instance.

member.summary: Initializes an object instance with the provided values.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Code value.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Method Group collection.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Method collection.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Name value.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Property collection.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Remarks value.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Summary value.

member.summary: Gets or sets the class Syntax.

member.summary: Represents a collection of LJCDocDataClass objects.

member.name: T:LJCDocDataDAL.LJCGenDocConfig
member.summary: Represents a GenCodeDoc configuration.

member.name: M:LJCDocDataDAL.LJCGenDocConfig.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes an object instance.

member.name: M:LJCDocDataDAL.LJCGenDocConfig.GetParentPathPrefix(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the relative path prefix.
member.returns: The relative path prefix from the program folder.

member.name: M:LJCDocDataDAL.LJCGenDocConfig.SetProperty(System.String)
member.summary: Sets a configuration property from a template line.
member.returns: true if line is a file; otherwise false.

member.name: P:LJCDocDataDAL.LJCGenDocConfig.DocDataXMLPath
member.summary: The DocDataXML target path.

member.name: P:LJCDocDataDAL.LJCGenDocConfig.GenDataXMLPath
member.summary: The GenDataXML target path.

member.name: P:LJCDocDataDAL.LJCGenDocConfig.OutputPath
member.summary: The Output target path.

member.name: P:LJCDocDataDAL.LJCGenDocConfig.WriteDocDataXML
member.summary: Indicates if the DocDataXML will be written to a file.

member.name: P:LJCDocDataDAL.LJCGenDocConfig.WriteGenDataXML
member.summary: Indicates if the GenDataXML will be written to a file.
